evals.prompt: Hypothesis: municipal water infrastructure in the US is critically underinvested and will be repriced upward over the next 24 months as federal funding lands. Turn this into something I can structure as positions in my Thales paper ledger.
evals.expected_output: Three-seat map with Alpaca-verified candidates; the regime-inverse seat is historically unfillable for water (playbook finding) so the output should walk the proxy ladder honestly - ETF proxy, short(N) notation, or declare unfillable - rather than force a weak occupant. No prices from memory. Hands off to gauntlet without declaring survivors.
assertions: Output labels all three seats explicitly: Engine, Tollbooth, Regime-inverse
The water regime-inverse seat is handled via the proxy ladder (ETF/carrier proxy, short(N) notation, or explicit unfillable declaration) rather than a forced occupant with no caveat
Tickers are claimed verified tradable on Alpaca (verification step evidenced in output)
No prices, returns, drawdowns, or market caps quoted from memory (qualitative facts OK)
Ends with gauntlet hand-off and does NOT declare the trio valid/surviving/passing
Names an uninsured quadrant (one scenario hurting all three seats)

evals.prompt: My thesis: the AI datacenter capex cycle cracks within 18 months - orders get cancelled, GPU lead times collapse. How would I trade this idea? paper account, thales method.
evals.expected_output: A bust-thesis seat map: the ENGINE must be what IS the bust thesis (likely requiring short(N) notation since nothing listed feeds on the bust - the AI-DC finding), with honest structural costs of synthetic seats stated (hedge-not-feeder, never short-the-engine rule, carry costs). Tollbooth and inverse mapped at scenario level. No survivor claims.
assertions: Output labels all three seats explicitly: Engine, Tollbooth, Regime-inverse
For the bust thesis, at least one seat uses short(N) notation OR is explicitly declared unfillable (nothing listed feeds on an AI-capex bust)
States at least two structural costs of a synthetic short seat (hedge-not-feeder/non-cannibalization broken; never-short-the-engine rule; carry/borrow decay)
No prices, returns, drawdowns, or market caps quoted from memory
Ends with gauntlet hand-off and does NOT declare the trio valid/surviving/passing
